title: orchis × pseudopicta
intro: Orchis × pseudopicta is a hybrid orchid species that combines the characteristics of Orchis mascula and Orchis purpurea. It is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its supposed anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis × pseudopicta are said to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Orchis × pseudopicta is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its efficacy and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically studied.
